description:
## app [1.12.7](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.6...v1.12.7) (2026-03-28)


### Improvements

* Add silva-library 1.3.0 from SilvaTechB/silva-library GitHub Packages
* Split silva-library into android and jvm variants
* Authenticate via GITHUB_ACTOR and GITHUB_TOKEN
